models.label: F1 axiomatic (kernel-exact)
models.note: ordered ring + one sqrt axiom; geometry skeleton, exact

models.label: Minimal Euclidean-field model
models.note: sqrt a model primitive; algebraic closure tower

models.label: Full ZFC model of R (set.mm)
models.note: set.mm constructed R; dominated by resqrtth (analytic sqrt)

lemmas.name: simpl
lemmas.blurb: Left conjunction elimination, from the df-an abbreviation.

lemmas.name: G0-congsub
lemmas.statement: |- ( x = y -> ( sqd a x ) = ( sqd a y ) )
lemmas.blurb: Congruence of squared distance under point equality.

lemmas.name: loclink
lemmas.statement: |- ( sqd b c ) = ( ( ( sqd a b ) + ( sqd a c ) ) -x ( ( dot a b c ) + ( dot a b c ) ) )
lemmas.blurb: Law of cosines as a reusable identity, decided by the ring normalizer.

lemmas.name: sqcong
lemmas.blurb: a^2=b^2 and 0<=ab imply a=b, via a d^4 square-squeeze (no zero-divisor axiom).

lemmas.name: mulcposcan
lemmas.blurb: Cancel a strictly-positive factor, via a (d*w)^2 square-squeeze.

lemmas.name: G4-sas
lemmas.statement: |- ( sqd b c ) = ( sqd f g )
ess: |- ( sqd a b ) = ( sqd e f )
|- ( sqd a c ) = ( sqd e g )
|- ( ACong a b c e f g )
lemmas.blurb: SAS: unfold df-acong, substitute the two side equalities, cancel S=(sqd a b)(sqd a c)>0, derive dot a b c = dot e f g, then loclink twice plus congruence.
